recommendations.title: Time Lapse
recommendations.overview: Three friends discover a mysterious machine that takes pictures 24 hours into the future and conspire to use it for personal gain, until disturbing and dangerous images begin to develop.

recommendations.title: In Time
recommendations.overview: In the not-too-distant future, the aging gene has been switched off. To avoid overpopulation, time has become the currency and the way people pay for luxuries and necessities. The rich can live forever, while the rest struggle to negotiate for their

recommendations.title: Here Alone
recommendations.overview: A woman struggles to survive on her own in the wake of a mysterious epidemic, which has decimated society and forced her deep into the unforgiving wild.

recommendations.title: Mother's Day
recommendations.overview: Crazed members of a sadistic family return to their childhood home to terrorize the new owners.

recommendations.title: The Room
recommendations.overview: Kate and Matt discover that a part of their house can grant wishes. In the wake of two miscarriages, what they want most is a child.

recommendations.title: Containment
recommendations.overview: Neighbors in a block wake one morning to find they have been sealed inside their apartments. Can they work together to find out why? Or will they destroy each other in their fight to escape?

recommendations.title: TiMER
recommendations.genres: Fantasy, Drama, Comedy, Science Fiction, Romance
recommendations.overview: When implanted in a person's wrist, a TiMER counts down to the day the wearer finds true love. But Oona O'Leary faces the rare dilemma of a blank TiMER. Her soul mate - whoever and wherever he is - has yet to have a TiMER implanted. Staring down the

recommendations.title: The Beach House
recommendations.overview: A romantic getaway for two troubled college sweethearts turns into a struggle for survival when unexpected guests – and the surrounding environment – exhibit signs of a mysterious infection.

recommendations.title: War of the Worlds: The Attack
recommendations.overview: Three young astronomers fight to survive a deadly Martian invasion.

recommendations.title: Death's Roulette
